title: AshenOG's Green Ore Borders!
description: A texture pack that makes all ore borders bright green for increased visibility
body:
MINE MORE EFFICIENTLY WITH ASHENOG'S GREEN ORE BORDERS!!!
AshenOG's Green Ore Borders is a texture pack that adds a bright green border around all minecraft ores, giving them increased visibility in various parts of your minecraft world
![Desc Pic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d6352a36b79bb24c3689f55cb70757e49442bdc.png)
WHY GREEN BORDERS AS OPPOSED TO OTHER COLORS???
Green is a complimentary color to red, and also contrasts well with grey and black. This makes it the perfect color to use, as cave systems, mineshafts, and the nether all consist greatly of red, grey, and black.
![Desc Pic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2069d30cc7f5574a80c96de8894bc7369746a407.png)
![Desc Pic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69f0c9390fda16a2cc342416799df6758c97a4ce.png)
![Desc Pic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6a20efe728f5440795cd92dd16dd7dff139b08a.png)
[NOTES: THIS TEXTURE PACK DOES NOT INCLUDE A NO-FOG TEXURE FOR THE LAVA. IF YOU'D LIKE TO HAVE THAT, PLEASE SEARCH FOR A NO-FOG TEXTURE PACK ELSEWHERE. ALSO, THIS TEXTURE PACK SHOULD BE SERVER-FRIENDLY, BUT JUST TO BE SURE THAT THIS PACK COMPLIES WITH YOUR SERVERS RULES, PLEASE ASK YOUR MODERATORS ABOUT THIS BEFORE USING TO AVOID RISK OF BAN]
